data.content:
# Implementation тАФ Audit Results & Decisions

## Audit walk

Greps run over `src/**/__tests__/`:
- `spawn|execFile|execSync|spawnSync|child_process|bash -c` тЖТ 57 candidates
- `tmpdir|mkdtemp|writeFileSync|readFileSync|writeFile\(|readFile\(|fs\.write|fs\.read|fs\.mkdir` тЖТ 68 candidates
- `process\.env` тЖТ 6 candidates
- `fetch\(|http\.|net\.|listen\(|createServer|new WebSocket` тЖТ 0 candidates

Each candidate file was inspected. Files matching only through `vi.mock("node:child_process", ...)` / `vi.mock("node:fs/promises", ...)` / `vi.stubEnv()` are hermetic.

## Findings & dispositions

### Moved to `__manual_tests__/` (real fs + env mutation, refactor too invasive)
- `src/lib/__tests__/interaction-logger.test.ts` тАФ real `mkdtemp`, `writeFile`, `readFile`, `process.chdir`, `process.env.NODE_ENV` mutation. SUT writes JSONL via real fs; mocking it deeply would replicate the SUT.
- `src/lib/__tests__/agent-output-log.test.ts` тАФ same as above (tests stdout/stderr lazy-write paths on the same SUT).
- `src/lib/__tests__/agent-history-coverage-roots.test.ts` тАФ real `mkdtemp` + `writeFile` for log-root discovery; mutates `process.env.HOME` + `NODE_ENV` to steer production resolver.

### Refactored (`process.env` direct mutation тЖТ `vi.stubEnv` + `vi.unstubAllEnvs`)
- `src/lib/__tests__/bd-read-no-db.test.ts` тАФ `BD_NO_DB`, `FOOLERY_BD_READ_NO_DB`. Used `vi.stubEnv(name, undefined)` to delete; verified `env.BD_NO_DB === undefined` assertion still holds.
- `src/lib/__tests__/instrumentation.test.ts` тАФ `NEXT_RUNTIME`. Replaced 3 sites.
- `src/lib/__tests__/settings-coverage.test.ts` тАФ `FOOLERY_BACKEND`. Replaced manual save/restore with stubEnv + global afterEach.

### Already moved (prior implementation attempt)
- `src/bin/__tests__/foolery-config.test.ts` тЖТ `__manual_tests__/`
- `src/lib/__tests__/{app-update,help-cli,install-setup-cmd,version-cli}.test.ts` тЖТ `__manual_tests__/`

### Plan deviation: `app-update.test.ts` moved instead of mocked
The plan authorised "If the in-memory mock turns into a sprawl, fall back to moving". `app-update.test.ts` exercises the real fs lifecycle of an update-status JSON file across `mkdtemp` / `writeFile` / `readFile` / launcher-detect via `chmod`. Mocking `node:fs/promises` per-call would essentially reimplement the SUT in the mock layer; moving preserves coverage with no SUT change.

### Pre-existing duplicated docstrings (fixed)
`app-update`, `help-cli`, `install-setup-cmd`, `version-cli` had their `/** ... */` header written twice; collapsed to one.

## Verification

### Hostile-mode hermeticity matrix
| Scenario | Result |
| --- | --- |
| Port 3210 occupied (`nc -l 3210` running) | 3123 passed, 11 skipped, 42 todo |
| Minimal PATH (`PATH=/usr/bin:/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin`) | 3123 passed, 11 skipped, 42 todo |
| `FOOLERY_*` env scrubbed (`env -u FOOLERY_X ...`) | 3123 passed, 11 skipped, 42 todo |

All three identical тЖТ suite is host-state independent.

### Quality gate
- `bun run lint` тЬУ
- `bunx tsc --noEmit` тЬУ
- `bun run test` тЬУ тАФ 310 files, 3123 tests pass
- `bun run test:storybook` тЬУ тАФ 6 files, 40 tests pass
- `bun run build` тЬУ
